---
title: 'No more to-do lists...'
date: '2016-08-13T16:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4631654980795110868'
blogger_filename: '/2016/08/no-more-to-do-lists.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Venting'
---

<br />
I just want a relaxing weekend... is that too much to ask?<br />
<br />
When I was my kids age I was cooking my own food. She babies these kids too much by doing everything for them.<br />
<br />
Every decision I make at home has to be weighed in the balance of "What would Flavia say?" Well Fuck that. She can make the decisions then... "Go ask your mom, because no matter what I say, she'll tell me why it was wrong."<br />
<br />
But then she'll come in an attack me for not "being involved". I can't win at home...<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
